news.title: March 2026 AI Roundup: MCP Hits 97 Million Installs
news.summary: The Model Context Protocol crossed 97 million installations, cementing its transition from experimental standard to foundational agentic infrastructure. March delivered a wave of new AI models pushing boundaries of capability, efficiency, and accessibility.

news.title: Neuromorphic Computers Solve Complex Physics Simulations
news.summary: Neuromorphic computers modeled after the human brain can now solve complex equations behind physics simulations — once thought possible only with energy-hungry supercomputers.

news.title: CoreWeave Secures $8.5B Loan as AI Cloud Demand Surges
news.summary: CoreWeave locks in $8.5 billion in new financing through a delayed-draw term loan facility, months after Nvidia's $2B investment, as demand for AI cloud infrastructure accelerates.

news.title: Starcloud Raises $170M for Orbital AI Data Centers
news.summary: Redmond-based orbital AI infrastructure startup Starcloud raises $170M at $1.1B valuation, hitting unicorn status just 17 months after Y Combinator demo day. Plans to launch AI data centers in orbit as Earth-based compute demand outpaces limits.

news.title: VivaTech AfricaTech Award 2026: Nigeria, Kenya, Egypt Lead
news.summary: Europe's largest startup event VivaTech reveals Top 30 of AfricaTech Award 2026, with Nigeria, Kenya, and Egypt as the three most represented countries. Recognition for startups building tech solutions addressing Africa's economic challenges.

news.title: Africa's Emerging Silicon Valleys: Lagos, Nairobi, Cape Town
news.summary: Across Africa, cities like Lagos, Nairobi, and Cape Town emerge as dynamic technology hubs, earning recognition as the continent's new Silicon Valleys. A powerful tech shift underway driven by young, entrepreneurial talent.

news.title: AI Startup Axiom Valued at $1.6B Building Mistake-Checking Systems
news.summary: Tiny startup Axiom valued at $1.6 billion is building AI systems that can autonomously check for mistakes in code, documents, and data. A growing niche as enterprises seek reliable AI verification.

news.title: Eswatini's Growing Fintech Ecosystem in 2026
news.summary: A look at the economic development and fintech landscape in Eswatini, as the nation builds its digital finance infrastructure and positions itself within Africa's expanding fintech corridor.

news.title: IQM Quantum Computers Raises €50M from BlackRock Funds
news.summary: Finnish quantum hardware startup IQM Quantum Computers secures €50 million ($57.6M) in venture funding from BlackRock-managed funds, accelerating European quantum computing race.

news.title: ChipChip Gross Margin Stable at 15.46%
news.summary: ChipChip's gross margin remains steady at 15.46% — fresh new day, continuing the grind!
